metadata.raw_text: {"scores":{"clarity":4,"simplicity":4,"brevity_economy":4,"structure_flow":2,"specificity_precision":3,"humanity_voice":3,"overall":3},"rationale":"Clear, readable memo with a sensible opening, apology, and summary of the fix. But it stays fairly generic, uses placeholders instead of real specifics, and cuts off mid-bullet, so the structure feels incomplete and it never fully delivers the 'what employees should expect next' section."}

rationale: Clear, readable memo with a sensible opening, apology, and summary of the fix. But it stays fairly generic, uses placeholders instead of real specifics, and cuts off mid-bullet, so the structure feels incomplete and it never fully delivers the 'what employees should expect next' section.
